name: New Skill Request
about: Suggest a new ROS2 skill for the library
title: '[SKILL] '
labels: enhancement, new-skill
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Name

**Proposed slash command:** `/ros2-`
**Category:** <!-- Code Generation | Build | Testing | Debugging | Runtime | Bag Files | Other -->

## Problem Statement

What ROS2 workflow pain point does this skill solve?

## Proposed behavior

What should the skill do when invoked? Include:
- What arguments it accepts
- What it outputs or generates
- How it handles edge cases

## Example usage

```
/ros2-my-skill <args>
```

Expected output or generated files:

## Why not use existing skills?

How is this different from what's already in the library?

## Checklist

- [ ] Searched existing skills — this is not already covered
- [ ] Searched existing issues — not already requested
- [ ] The skill is specific to ROS2 (not a general coding task)
